meta.notes:
Performance Notes

Average performance: 60+ FPS.

Gecko and Mono must be installed, or FIFA Setup will not open. You can install both from the Start Menu.

Do not change the Box64 version or preset. The container is already configured for the best performance and compatibility. Changing these settings may reduce performance or introduce issues.

container.box64PresetVars: BOX64_DYNAREC_SAFEFLAGS=2 BOX64_DYNAREC_FASTNAN=1 BOX64_DYNAREC_FASTROUND=2 BOX64_DYNAREC_X87DOUBLE=0 BOX64_DYNAREC_BIGBLOCK=3 BOX64_DYNAREC_STRONGMEM=0 BOX64_DYNAREC_FORWARD=512 BOX64_DYNAREC_CALLRET=1 BOX64_DYNAREC_WAIT=0 BOX64_AVX=0 BOX64_MAXCPU=0 BOX64_UNITYPLAYER=1 BOX64_DYNAREC_WEAKBARRIER=1 BOX64_DYNAREC_ALIGNED_ATOMICS=0 BOX64_DYNAREC_DF=1 BOX64_DYNAREC_DIRTY=0 BOX64_DYNAREC_NATIVEFLAGS=0 BOX64_DYNAREC_PAUSE=0 BOX64_MMAP32=1
container.envVars: WRAPPER_MAX_IMAGE_COUNT=0 ZINK_DESCRIPTORS=lazy ZINK_DEBUG=compact MESA_SHADER_CACHE_DISABLE=false MESA_SHADER_CACHE_MAX_SIZE=512MB mesa_glthread=true WINEESYNC=1 PULSE_LATENCY_MSEC=40 WRAPPER_NO_PATCH_OPCONSTCOMP=1
